introducedBy: Static dashboard heading predating the 25-entry historical backfill
detectedBy: Manual visual countercheck of Pages deploy ed889faafb92ec359c3dea7008a9c27ae8ac15fb
problem: The runtime evidence and dynamic audit UI reported 25/25, while index.html still displayed the hardcoded text 23/23 Arbeitsregeln und Behauptungen terminal klassifiziert.
impact: The public dashboard contained two contradictory evidence totals, so the visible countercheck for PR #31 failed even though CI and runtime JSON passed.
correctiveActions: Replace the hardcoded numeric heading with drift-safe wording.
Add a static regression test rejecting stale hardcoded evidence fractions.
Make the Playwright runtime proof reject the exact stale 23/23 text.
Repeat Pages deployment and manual desktop/mobile countercheck.
Close the incident only after the new public screenshots pass.
notClaimed: The failed deploy is not treated as a fully closed visible proof.
No product asset or canon approval is affected.
